{{CargoOrgan
|name=Eden Neuron
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10844
|idx=49
|description=As a major experimental institute of Earth's will, several superb bio-gears have been created in Eden. This neuron, with performance equivalent to a quantum computer, is one of them.
|skill=
|hp=1666
|def=141
|atk=109
|rush=215
|gene1=In explorations, Angel Cells gained +4%
|gene2=In explorations, Mecha Cells gained +4%
|gene3=Rebel Cabin Output +5%
|gene4={race} DEF +8 per Cell Furnace level-up
Cell Furnace LVL upgraded: 20/20
|gene7=Rebel Cabin Output +10% (Awakened)
|}}
